name: Whistleblower Bombshell
text: A senior engineer at a major AI lab went public, revealing the lab had been running undeclared training runs above treaty thresholds for over a year. The lab denied the claims. The engineer requested asylum.
image-prompt: A person in business casual clothes sitting in front of TV cameras and microphones at a press conference, documents spread on the table, corporate logo visible but blurred in the background, tense atmosphere, digital painting, no text
